tripOverview.intro: San Juan, Puerto Rico combines vibrant Caribbean culture with stunning beaches and historic charm. This tropical paradise offers colorful colonial architecture, incredible Spanish cuisine, and some of the most beautiful coastlines in the Caribbean.
tripOverview.vibe: A perfect blend of romantic sunsets, cultural discovery, and endless beach days in the heart of the Caribbean.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April is perfect with warm temperatures, low rainfall, and fewer crowds than peak season.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Historic colonial district with colorful buildings and cobblestone streets.

attractions.name: El Yunque National Forest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls and hiking trails.

attractions.name: Flamenco Beach
attractions.desc: Pristine white sand beach on nearby Culebra island.

destinationOverview.transportation: San Juan has excellent public transportation including buses and the Tren Urbano metro system connecting major areas. Taxis and ride-sharing services like Uber are readily available throughout the metropolitan area. Rental cars are recommended for exploring beaches and attractions outside the city center.
destinationOverview.tip: Use oficial taxis or rideshares for safety, and always agree on fares beforehand with non-metered taxis.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, especially in Old San Juan and Condado areas.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans for Puerto Rico and the Caribbean region.

days.intro: Start your romantic getaway exploring the colorful colonial streets and historic fortresses of Old San Juan.

morning.name: Arrival & Hotel Check-in
morning.desc: Settle into your romantic accommodations in San Juan.

morning.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
morning.desc: Explore the cobblestone streets and colorful colonial architecture.

afternoon.name: Castillo San Felipe del Morro
afternoon.desc: Tour this impressive 16th-century fortress with ocean views.

afternoon.name: Plaza de Armas
afternoon.desc: Relax in the main square and watch local life unfold.

evening.name: Romantic dinner at Marmalade
evening.desc: Fine dining experience with innovative Caribbean cuisine.

evening.name: Paseo de la Princesa sunset stroll
evening.desc: Romantic waterfront walk along the historic promenade.

days.tip: Wear comfortable walking shoes for the cobblestone streets and bring a hat for sun protection.

days.intro: Spend your day soaking up the sun at San Juan's most beautiful beaches.

morning.name: Breakfast at Caficultura
morning.desc: Start with excellent Puerto Rican coffee and pastries.

morning.name: Condado Beach
morning.desc: Relax on the golden sand beach in the trendy Condado district.

afternoon.name: Beachside lunch at Oceano
afternoon.desc: Fresh seafood with stunning ocean views.

afternoon.name: Ocean Park Beach
afternoon.desc: Continue beach hopping at this quieter, more local beach.

evening.name: Sunset cocktails at La Placita
evening.desc: Experience San Juan's vibrant nightlife scene.

evening.name: Dinner at Verde Mesa
evening.desc: Farm-to-table vegetarian cuisine in a romantic setting.

days.tip: Apply reef-safe sunscreen frequently and stay hydrated with plenty of water.

days.intro: Immerse yourself in Puerto Rican culture, art, and traditional flavors.

morning.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico
morning.desc: Explore Puerto Rican art from the 17th century to present.

morning.name: Santurce Street Art Tour
morning.desc: Discover vibrant murals and street art in the arts district.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Casita Miramar
afternoon.desc: Traditional Puerto Rican vegetarian dishes in a charming setting.

afternoon.name: Cueva Ventana
afternoon.desc: Spectacular cave with panoramic views of the northern coast.

evening.name: Cooking class at Flavors of San Juan
evening.desc: Learn to make traditional Puerto Rican dishes together.

evening.name: Salsa dancing at Nuyorican Cafe
evening.desc: Experience live music and dancing in a legendary venue.

days.tip: Many cultural sites offer discounts for couples, so always ask about special rates.

days.intro: Get your adrenaline pumping with outdoor adventures in Puerto Rico's natural beauty.

morning.name: El Yunque Rainforest Hike
morning.desc: Guided hike through the only tropical rainforest in the US National Forest System.

morning.name: La Mina Waterfall
morning.desc: Swim in the refreshing natural pool beneath the waterfall.

afternoon.name: Lunch at El Verde BBQ
afternoon.desc: Local roadside BBQ with vegetarian options near El Yunque.

afternoon.name: Luquillo Beach
afternoon.desc: Relax on the pristine beach after your rainforest adventure.

evening.name: Bioluminescent Bay Tour
evening.desc: Magical evening kayaking through glowing waters in Fajardo.

evening.name: Late dinner at Passion by Chef Marisoll
evening.desc: Creative Caribbean cuisine with vegetarian options.

days.tip: Bring water shoes for the rainforest streams and waterproof bags for electronics.

days.intro: Enjoy a slower pace with spa treatments, romantic dining, and sunset views.

morning.name: Couples massage at Zen Spa
morning.desc: Relax together with oceanview spa treatments.

morning.name: Isla Verde Beach
morning.desc: Unwind on the beautiful beach near the spa.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Metropol
afternoon.desc: Cuban-Puerto Rican fusion with excellent vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Bacardí Distillery Tour
afternoon.desc: Learn about rum production with tastings (mocktails available).

evening.name: Sunset sailing
evening.desc: Romantic catamaran cruise along the San Juan coastline.

evening.name: Dinner at 1919 Restaurant
evening.desc: Upscale oceanfront dining with creative vegetarian menu.

days.tip: Book spa treatments in advance and arrive early to enjoy the relaxation areas.

days.intro: Venture beyond the tourist areas to experience authentic Puerto Rican culture.

morning.name: Rio Camuy Cave Park
morning.desc: Explore one of the world's largest underground cave systems.

morning.name: Arecibo Observatory
morning.desc: Visit the iconic radio telescope and science center.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Sazón Criollo
afternoon.desc: Authentic criollo cuisine in a local neighborhood.

afternoon.name: Piñones Beach
afternoon.desc: Local beach with food kiosks and natural beauty.

evening.name: Food truck hopping in Piñones
evening.desc: Sample local street food from beachside kiosks.

evening.name: Live music at Café Berlin
evening.desc: Intimate venue with local musicians and craft cocktails.

days.tip: Bring cash for food kiosks and small vendors who may not accept cards.

days.intro: Your final full day is dedicated to pure beach relaxation and romantic moments.

morning.name: Ferry to Culebra Island
morning.desc: Take the ferry to explore pristine Flamenco Beach.

morning.name: Flamenco Beach
morning.desc: Consistently rated one of the world's best beaches.

afternoon.name: Beach picnic lunch
afternoon.desc: Enjoy prepared lunch on the stunning white sand beach.

afternoon.name: Snorkeling at Tamarindo Beach
afternoon.desc: Explore underwater coral gardens and tropical fish.

evening.name: Return ferry to San Juan
evening.desc: Scenic ferry ride back to the main island.

evening.name: Farewell dinner at Cocina Abierta
evening.desc: Celebrate your last night with innovative Puerto Rican cuisine.

days.tip: Ferry schedules can change due to weather, so confirm departure times the night before.

days.intro: Enjoy final moments in paradise before your flight back to Philadelphia.

morning.name: Final breakfast at Panadería España
morning.desc: Traditional Puerto Rican bakery for last-minute pastries and coffee.

morning.name: Last-minute shopping in Old San Juan
morning.desc: Pick up souvenirs and local crafts from artisan shops.

afternoon.name: Hotel checkout and airport transfer
afternoon.desc: Head to Luis Muñoz Marín International Airport.

afternoon.name: Departure to Philadelphia
afternoon.desc: Flight back home with unforgettable memories.

days.tip: Allow extra time at the airport for security and arrive at least 2 hours before domestic flights.

food.intro: San Juan's culinary scene blends traditional Puerto Rican flavors with international influences, offering excellent vegetarian options.
food.tip: Many restaurants offer 'comida criolla' with vegetarian versions of traditional dishes - always ask your server about plant-based options.

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.desc: Historic charm with cobblestone streets and colorful colonial buildings
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to major attractions and restaurants

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.desc: Modern beachfront district with upscale dining and nightlife
neighborhoods.whyStay: Direct beach access and LGBTQ+ friendly atmosphere

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.desc: Hotel zone near the airport with beautiful beaches and resorts
neighborhoods.whyStay: Easy airport access and resort amenities

budget.name: Dream Inn PR
budget.vibe: Modern boutique hotel in trendy Santurce

budget.name: Acacia Seaside Inn
budget.vibe: Cozy beachfront property with personalized service

midRange.name: Serafina Beach Hotel
midRange.vibe: Modern beachfront hotel with rooftop pool

luxury.name: La Concha Resort
luxury.vibe: Iconic modernist resort on Condado Beach

luxury.name: El San Juan Hotel
luxury.vibe: Legendary luxury resort with casino and spa

hotels.tip: Book accommodations in Condado or Old San Juan for the best romantic atmosphere and LGBTQ+ friendly environment.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Rainforest Adventure
getYourGuide.desc: Full-day guided tour with transportation, waterfalls, and hiking trails through Puerto Rico's tropical paradise.

getYourGuide.name: Bioluminescent Bay Night Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Magical evening kayaking experience in Laguna Grande with expert guides and equipment included.

getYourGuide.name: Culebra Island Beach Hopping
getYourGuide.desc: Day trip to pristine Flamenco and Tamarindo beaches with snorkeling gear and ferry transportation.

hiddenGems.name: Piñones Boardwalk
hiddenGems.desc: Local beach area with authentic food kiosks and mangrove views away from tourist crowds.

hiddenGems.name: Paseo de la Princesa
hiddenGems.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for sunset strolls with harbor views and local art.

hiddenGems.name: La Placita de Santurce
hiddenGems.desc: Vibrant local nightlife district where San Juan residents gather for drinks and dancing.

packing.title: April in San Juan, Puerto Rico
packing.intro: Pack for warm tropical weather with occasional afternoon showers and plenty of outdoor activities.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase plus carry-on should be sufficient for a week-long tropical vacation.
packing.tip: Pack reef-safe sunscreen and bring more than you think you'll need - it's expensive on the island.

bookTrip.intro: Round-trip flights from Philadelphia to San Juan typically cost $350-500 per person in April.
